name: air-travel-wallet-v1
description: V1 proof-of-life for flight checkout autofill, traveler vault, booking risk checks, and trip dashboard.

scripts.check: npm run build:web && tsc --noEmit && node --check apps/web/server.js && node --check apps/web/public/app.js && node --check apps/extension/src/content/content.js && node --check apps/extension/src/popup/popup.js && node --check apps/extension/src/background/service-worker.js && node --check apps/web/agent/loop.js && node --check apps/web/agent/action-governor.js && node --check apps/web/agent/action-lifecycle.js && node --check apps/web/agent/action-semantics.js && node --check apps/web/agent/current-candidate-builder.js && node --check apps/web/agent/surface-contract.js && node --check apps/web/agent/invariants.js && node --check apps/web/agent/transaction-facts.js && node --check apps/web/agent/control-alias-index.js && node --check apps/web/agent/observation-diff.js && node --check apps/web/agent/observation-candidates.js && node --check apps/web/agent/transition-evaluator.js && node --check apps/web/agent/skill-expander.js && node --check apps/web/agent/select-candidate.js && node --check apps/web/agent/verify-and-plan.js && node --check apps/web/agent/requirement-extractor.js && node --check apps/web/agent/session-store.js && node --check apps/web/agent/trace-store.js && node --check apps/web/agent/openai-client.js && node --check apps/web/agent/schemas.js && node --check packages/shared/agent-state/index.js && node --check packages/shared/agent-actions/index.js && node --check packages/shared/requirements/index.js && node --check packages/shared/policy/index.js
scripts.test:agent: npm run test:agent:unit && npm run test:agent:browser
